mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM mall_order WHERE (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = 0) AND order_status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND pay_expire_time < FROM_UNIXTIME(#{expiredTime} / 1000)

SELECT
FROM mall_order WHERE (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = 0) AND user_id = #{userId} AND paid = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalOrders, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingPayment, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingShipment, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PENDING_RECEIPT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingReceipt, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'REFUNDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS refunded, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'AFTER_SALE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS afterSale, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN paid = 1 AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') THEN pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalSales, COALESCE(SUM(refund_price), 0) AS refundedAmount FROM mall_order WHERE (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = 0)
